name.description: The name of the line item, typically a product or SKU name.

description.description: An optional free-form description of the line item.

quantity.description: The number of units of a product or service that this line item is for.           Must be a whole number. Defaults to 1 if not provided.

unit_amount.description: The cost per unit of the product or service that this line item is for,           specified in the invoice currency's smallest unit.

unit_amount_decimal.description: The cost per unit of the product or service that this line item is for,           specified in the invoice currency's smallest unit. Accepts decimal strings with up to 12 decimals

direction.description: Either `debit` or `credit`. `debit` indicates that a client owes the business money           and increases the invoice's `total_amount` due. `credit` has the opposite intention and effect.

metadata.description: Additional data represented as key-value pairs. Both the key and value must be strings.
